modal.title: We have a gift for you
modal.description: Your opinion means a lot to us. Answer a few quick questions about your experience and earn <highlight>free credits</highlight> directly in your account.
modal.cta: I want to claim my credits

page.title: Your opinion is worth credits
page.description: You're one of The AI Model Lab's first subscribers and your feedback shapes what we'll build. Answer in under 3 minutes and get bonus credits in your account.
page.submitReady: All set! Click to submit and receive your credits.
page.submitPending: Fill in the required questions to continue.
page.accessDeniedDesc: This page is exclusive to active subscribers.
page.submitSuccessDesc: Thanks for your feedback. The credits are already in your account.

success.title: Got it. Thanks a lot.
success.description: Your feedback has been recorded and every answer helps us make The AI Model Lab even better for you.
success.creditsNote: Already available. Use them whenever you want.

q1.title: How likely are you to recommend The AI Model Lab to a creator friend?

q2.title: How do you rate the quality of the results?
q2.subtitle: Images, videos and motion generated on the platform

q3.title: What's your main goal with The AI Model Lab?
q3.subtitle: Pick the option that fits best
q3.otherPlaceholder: Ex: testing for a personal project, academic research, hobby...

q4.title: Which features do you use most?
q4.subtitle: Select up to 3 · {count}/3 selected

q5.title: What impressed you positively?
q5.placeholder: Ex: face quality, how fast videos generate, the prompt library...

q6.title: What could be improved or is missing?
q6.subtitle: The most valuable feedback for us. Be honest.
q6.placeholder: Ex: credits run out fast, video quality drops with motion, can't export vertical...

q7.title: What new feature would you like to see?
q7.subtitle: Dream big
q7.placeholder: Ex: voice cloning, full carousel generation, direct TikTok integration...

validation.minCharsShort: Tell us a bit more (min. {min} characters)
